---
title: "Projects"
---

:::{.grid}
:::{.g-col-4}

### Insecticides evalutation 

Efficacy assessment of new insecticides against Aedes. 

[Read more](project_insecticides.qmd)  


:::

:::{.g-col-4}

### Anorythm

Studies of chronobiology of *Anopheles* using mixed models and HMM. 

[Read more](project_anorythm.qmd)

[GitHub](https://github.com)
:::

:::{.g-col-4}

### Anivermate

Evaluation of efficacy against mosquitoes of a new formulation of Ivermectin : cross over between efficacy assessment and eco-toxicology. 

[Read more](project_anivermate.qmd)

:::

:::{.g-col-4}

### IMPACT

Evaluation of efficacy against mosquitoes of a new formulation of Ivermectin : pre-clinical phases and epidemiological modeling. 

[Read more](project_IMPACT.qmd)
:::

:::{.g-col-4}

### Moving larvae

Deep video analysis for reveal movement response in ecological relevant concentration of permethrin. 

[Read more](project_movLarv.qmd)
:::

:::
